---
title: "Meta Summary - Gone Golfing"
subtitle: "The Full Summary Statement for Each Phase"
author: "Michael Manolakis"
date: today
date-format: "[Spring] YYYY"
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    number-sections: true
    colorlinks: true
    geometry: margin=1in
---

\newpage

{{< include "../Phase 1 Parsing/00 - Phase1_Summary.md" >}}

\newpage

{{< include "../Phase 2 Spatial Polygons and True Acreage/00 - Phase2_Summary.md" >}}

\newpage

{{< include "../Phase 3 Economic Merge and MICE Imputation/00 - Phase3_Summary.md" >}}

\newpage

{{< include "../Phase 4 Econometric Modeling/00 - Phase4_Summary.md" >}}

\newpage

{{< include "../Phase 5 The Hawaii Micro-Case Study/00 - Phase5_Summary.md" >}}

\newpage

{{< include "../Phase 6 Visualization/00 - Phase6_Summary.md" >}}

\newpage

{{< include "../Phase 7 Documentation, Discussion and Write Up/other/Phase7_Summary.md" >}}
